message:
fix(connector,api): add checkpoint hash chain verification and defer process start time pinning

Add hash chain integrity verification to policy checkpoint module: verify
each checkpoint's hash against expected chain value before acceptance.
Introduce CheckpointChainError::HashChainBreak error for chain breaks.
Add test_append_rejects_invalid_checkpoint_hash() proving rejection.

Defer PROCESS_START initialization in operator_routes from get_or_init()
to get().unwrap_or_else() to prevent pre-bootstrap reads from pinning
the shared baseline timestamp before the service is fully initialized.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
